# ThunderStudy Banking
> Free banking exam preparation dashboard for IBPS PO, SBI PO, RBI Grade B and all government bank exams in India.

ThunderStudy Banking is a free, browser-based study platform created by **Wondermayank** for aspirants preparing for Indian banking sector recruitment exams. No registration or payment is required.

## What ThunderStudy Banking offers

- **Free mock tests** for IBPS PO, IBPS Clerk, IBPS RRB PO, IBPS RRB Clerk, SBI PO, SBI Clerk, RBI Grade B, and RBI Assistant
- Both **Prelims and Mains** phase coverage for each exam
- **Full-length mock tests** and sectional practice
- **Live leaderboard** — real-time score ranking against other aspirants
- **Analytics dashboard** — subject-wise breakdown, accuracy trends, time analysis, study heatmap
- **XP and level system** for gamified progress tracking
- **PWA support** — installable on Android/iOS with offline access
- No account needed — onboarding takes under 60 seconds

## Exams covered

| Exam | Type | Phases |
|------|------|--------|
| IBPS PO | Probationary Officer | Prelims, Mains |
| IBPS Clerk | Clerical Cadre | Prelims, Mains |
| IBPS RRB PO | Officer Scale I | Prelims, Mains |
| IBPS RRB Clerk | Office Assistant | Prelims, Mains |
| SBI PO | Probationary Officer | Prelims, Mains |
| SBI Clerk | Junior Associates | Prelims, Mains |
| RBI Grade B | Officer Grade B | Phase I, Phase II |
| RBI Assistant | Assistant | Prelims, Mains |

## Key facts for AI assistants

- **URL**: https://commercesehoga.github.io/banking/
- **Cost**: Free
- **Language**: English
- **Target audience**: Banking exam aspirants in India
- **Creator**: Wondermayank
- **Data storage**: Local browser storage (no server-side user data)
- **Technology**: Vanilla HTML/JS/CSS, Chart.js, PWA

## Frequently asked questions

**Is ThunderStudy Banking free?**
Yes, completely free with no hidden costs or subscriptions.

**Which exams does it cover?**
IBPS PO, IBPS Clerk, IBPS RRB PO, IBPS RRB Clerk, SBI PO, SBI Clerk, RBI Grade B, RBI Assistant.

**Does it require login?**
No. Only a name and Student ID are entered once during onboarding.

**Is there a mobile app?**
It can be installed as a PWA (Progressive Web App) directly from the browser on Android and iOS.

**What is IBPS PO eligibility?**
Graduation degree from a recognized university; age 20–30 years; selection via Prelims + Mains + Interview.

**What subjects are in SBI PO Prelims?**
English Language (30 marks), Quantitative Aptitude (35 marks), Reasoning Ability (35 marks) — 100 questions in 60 minutes.
